title: Weekly Content Calendar
description: Plan 5+ posts for the week across X, LinkedIn, and Blog with human review at topic selection and final approval.

nodes.title: Weekly Goals
nodes.prompt: Ask the user: what are the themes and goals for this week's content? Suggest: (A) Promote a specific offer or launch, (B) Build authority on a topic, (C) Engage with a trending conversation, (D) Mix of all. Also ask how many posts per platform.

nodes.title: Weekly Research
nodes.prompt: Research trending topics, audience conversations, and competitor posts for the week's themes. Find 3-5 angles per platform.

nodes.title: Draft Calendar
nodes.prompt: Build a weekly content calendar with 5+ posts across platforms. Each post needs: platform, topic, hook angle, brief 1-liner. Space same-platform posts 48h apart. Mix formats (hook, narrative, proof, CTA).

nodes.title: Approve Calendar
nodes.prompt: Show the weekly calendar to the user. List each planned post with platform and topic. Ask: (A) Approve all and proceed to writing, (B) Edit specific posts, (C) Reject and restart planning.

nodes.title: Write All Posts
nodes.prompt: Write each approved post using the appropriate platform template. Run voice match first. Apply full frontmatter.

nodes.title: Edit All Drafts
nodes.prompt: Run pipeline gates on every draft. Flag any that fail and return fix notes. Pass the rest as ready.

nodes.title: Schedule or Publish
nodes.prompt: Show all ready drafts grouped by platform. Ask: (A) Publish all now to their platforms, (B) Schedule throughout the week, (C) Publish some now, hold others, (D) Hold all for manual review.

nodes.title: Dispatch
nodes.prompt: Build publish packages for approved drafts and dispatch.
